Malta uses the shared OPS sheet from data/sheet-config.json on GitHub. It updates for everyone when the site is deployed — no per-browser sheet settings.

Other countries: Sheet ID and GID are saved only in this browser. Use Import sheet JSON if you have a small file {"sheetId":"…","gid":"…"} — nothing is sent to GitHub.
